creator: julio@meroh.net
text:
The master site of devel/orc seems gone: any end point in the given
        server yields a "welcome" page without any details.

        I think the package should be changed to use

            http://gstreamer.freedesktop.org/data/src/orc/

        instead, which contains the latest release and matches the recorded
        checksum.

Fix: 

Update MASTER_SITES with the address provided above.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to fetch the distfile of devel/orc.
